title: IMMZ.D2.DT.HepatitisA.IHAV2 ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.HepatitisA.IHAV2 ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

csailt12m-35.44.en: Client's age is less than 12 months

nhapsdwa-53.139.en: No hepatitis A primary series doses were administered

csaimtoet12m-47.44.en: Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months

ohapsdwa-52.139.en: One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered

tlhadwalt6ma-67.121.en: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered less than 6 months ago

tlhadwamt6ma-67.121.en: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered more than 6 months ago

thapsdwa-54.139.en: Two hepatitis A primary series doses were administered

cindfhav-45.52.en: Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination

cidfhav-41.48.en: Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination

haisic-45.53.en: Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete
